title: Monster Room+
description: 15+ new monster rooms variants! Vanilla blocks only
body:
**🧱 Monster Room+**

Monster Room+ expands Minecraft’s classic dungeons with 15 brand-new monster room variants — each themed after different mobs!
From eerie Warden lairs deep below the deepslate to spooky Evoker crypts and bone-filled Skeleton chambers, every dungeon now feels unique and dangerous.
⚔️ Features
15 new monster room types, each with its own loot table and spawner setup
Themed dungeons for mobs like:

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

🧟 Zombie

☠️ Skeleton

🪄 Evoker

🪓 Pillager

🐷 Piglin Brute

🐸 Magma cube 

🔥 Iron golem

💀 Wither Skeleton

👁️ Enderman

🧌 Warden

![more](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7f8a47ccd55179b979ee31474da5f881aaf067f.png)

Naturally generates underground, just like classic dungeons

Perfect for exploration and dungeon-crawling modpacks

Compatible with most world generation and structure mods

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![magma cube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ba4efce86230c546c79f4a60f6a4d58af73c86c.png)
![stray](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6ffb78e8fe95c3882f33dc314438299de092e35.png)
![enderman](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed008510172b3a44fea5ed826ca899e0a12aeede.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod is created with: intellij

#AD
